messages.message:
Error: Cannot call impure function during render `Date.now` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent). C:\Users\abdo1\alghwairy_fin\src\components\AccountingView.tsx:368:132 366 |

{isSettlement ? 'SETTLEMENT ENTRY' : 'TAX INVOICE'}

367 |
> 368 |

#{isSettlement ? 'SET' : 'SL'}-{Date.now().toString().slice(-8).toUpperCase()}

| ^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function 369 |

DATE: {new Date().toLocaleDateString()}

370 |
371 |
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchLogs'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [fetchLogs]

suppressedMessages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

messages.message: Use "@ts-expect-error" instead of "@ts-ignore", as "@ts-ignore" will do nothing if the following line is error-free.

suggestions.desc: Replace "@ts-ignore" with "@ts-expect-error".
